name: pistolinkr-dashboard
description: Personal GitHub Dashboard with admin features and URL embedding

scripts.deploy: git add . && git commit -m "Update dashboard" && git push
scripts.deploy:patch: npm run version:patch && git commit -m "$(node -e "console.log(require('./scripts/version-update.js').generateCommitMessage('patch', require('./package.json').version))") && git push
scripts.deploy:minor: npm run version:minor && git commit -m "$(node -e "console.log(require('./scripts/version-update.js').generateCommitMessage('minor', require('./package.json').version))") && git push
scripts.deploy:major: npm run version:major && git commit -m "$(node -e "console.log(require('./scripts/version-update.js').generateCommitMessage('major', require('./package.json').version))") && git push

author: pistolinkr
